title: phtheirospermum glandulosum
intro: Phtheirospermum glandulosum, also known as the Phtheirospermum glandulosum plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phtheirospermum glandulosum include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. Phtheirospermum glandulosum is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or capsule, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
